As a admin or designer
I want to inspect shared UI components in Admin
So that shared controls can be checked before reuse

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] ComponentLibrary renders representative shared components.
- [ ] Admin Components tab opens the component library.
- [ ] Examples use current shared CSS classes.
- [ ] The page does not mutate production data.

Notes: Accessible through Admin tab once admin routing is available.
